title: Restaurant Menu Module
summary: Create menus, menu items, and item categories so customers and staff can quickly find the right items during ordering.

title: Restaurant Table Module
summary: Manage restaurant areas, dining tables, seating capacity, table status, and QR codes for table-based ordering.

title: Restaurant Reservation Module
summary: Record and manage advance table bookings so the restaurant can prepare seating before guests arrive.

title: Restaurant POS Module
summary: Use the Point of Sale screen to create orders, send KOTs, process bills, and collect payments during daily restaurant service.

title: Restaurant Order Module
summary: Monitor customer orders and kitchen tickets, including KOT status such as preparing, ready, cancelled, or completed depending on your setup.

title: Restaurant Customer Module
summary: Keep customer records and view order history linked to each customer.

title: Restaurant Staff Menu
summary: Add restaurant staff members and assign roles so each person has the right level of access.

title: Restaurant Payments Menu
summary: Review payment records, payment methods, order numbers, transaction dates, and pending balances.

title: Reports Menu
summary: Use reports to understand sales performance by period, item, and category.

title: Restaurant Settings Menu
summary: Configure restaurant details, app settings, branches, currency, emails, taxes, payment gateways, theme, staff roles, and reservations.

title: Operational Shifts
summary: Define business-day boundaries so orders, dashboard values, and reports follow the restaurant’s actual operating shifts instead of only calendar days.

title: Waiter Table Assignment Module
summary: Assign primary and secondary waiters to tables so table orders notify the right staff members.

title: Menu-to-Table Assignment
summary: Control which menu items appear for specific tables when customers order through table QR codes.

title: Daily Menu PDF Email
summary: Send a daily PDF copy of the restaurant menu to the administrator at a scheduled time.

title: Due Payment Reports
summary: Track partially paid orders, outstanding balances, and later settlement of due amounts.
